name: ValidateJSON
run: vehicle verify -s spec.vcl -v TestVerifier --network f:fake.onnx --property trivial --verifier-location=testVerifier --verifier-args='sat 'X_0=0.2,X_1=0.3,Y_0=3.0'' --cache verify-cache > /dev/null ; mv fake.onnx fake-changed.onnx && vehicle validate -c verify-cache -j && mv fake-changed.onnx fake.onnx
